FrontendBucketUrl.Description: URL of the frontend static website

FrontendBucketName.Description: Name of the frontend S3 bucket

D:\\KEVIN\\Proyectos\\UrbanShield\\backe.serviceRawFile:
service: urbanshield-backend

provider:
  name: aws
  runtime: nodejs18.x
  stage: ${opt:stage, 'dev'}
  region: ${opt:region, 'us-east-1'}

  # CORS configuration for HTTP API Gateway
  httpApi:
    cors:
      allowedOrigins:
        - http://localhost:5173
        - http://urbanshield-frontend-${self:provider.stage}.s3-website-us-east-1.amazonaws.com
        - https://dwnlwnmcbiheu.cloudfront.net
      allowedHeaders:
        - Content-Type
        - Authorization
        - X-Request-Id
      allowedMethods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - PATCH
        - DELETE
        - OPTIONS
      allowCredentials: true

  environment:
    NODE_ENV: production
    API_PREFIX: /api
    USE_IN_MEMORY_STORE: "false"
    # DynamoDB tables
    DYNAMODB_TABLE_USERS: !Ref UsersTable
    DYNAMODB_TABLE_REPORTS: !Ref ReportsTable
    DYNAMODB_TABLE_NOTIFICATIONS: !Ref NotificationsTable
    DYNAMODB_TABLE_ACTIVITY_LOGS: !Ref ActivityLogsTable
    DYNAMODB_TABLE_SUPPORT_MESSAGES: !Ref SupportMessagesTable
    # S3 buckets
    S3_BUCKET_NAME: ${self:custom.s3BucketName}
    S3_PROFILE_BUCKET_NAME: ${self:custom.profileBucketName}
    # Cognito
    USE_COGNITO: ${env:USE_COGNITO, 'true'}
    COGNITO_USER_POOL_ID: ${env:COGNITO_USER_POOL_ID, ''}
    COGNITO_CLIENT_ID: ${env:COGNITO_CLIENT_ID, ''}
    # JWT
    JWT_ACCESS_SECRET: ${env:JWT_ACCESS_SECRET}
    JWT_REFRESH_SECRET: ${env:JWT_REFRESH_SECRET}
    JWT_ACCESS_EXPIRES_IN: ${env:JWT_ACCESS_EXPIRES_IN, '15m'}
    JWT_REFRESH_EXPIRES_IN: ${env:JWT_REFRESH_EXPIRES_IN, '7d'}
    # CORS and frontend
    CORS_ORIGIN: "http://localhost:5173,http://urbanshield-frontend-${self:provider.stage}.s3-website-us-east-1.amazonaws.com,https://dwnlwnmcbiheu.cloudfront.net"
    FRONTEND_URL: "https://dwnlwnmcbiheu.cloudfront.net"
    # SNS
    SNS_TOPIC_EMERGENCY_ALERTS: !Ref EmergencyAlertsTopic
    # Location Service
    LOCATION_MAP_NAME: ${env:LOCATION_MAP_NAME, 'UrbanShieldMap'}
    LOCATION_PLACE_INDEX: ${env:LOCATION_PLACE_INDEX, 'UrbanShieldPlaceIndex'}
    # Email
    EMAIL_USER: ${env:EMAIL_USER, ''}
    EMAIL_PASS: ${env:EMAIL_PASS, ''}
    # Password reset
    PASSWORD_RESET_TOKEN_EXPIRES_IN: ${env:PASSWORD_RESET_TOKEN_EXPIRES_IN, '1h'}

  iam:
    role:
      statements:
        # Permisos para DynamoDB (tablas + todos los GSIs)
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - dynamodb:GetItem
            - dynamodb:PutItem
            - dynamodb:UpdateItem
            - dynamodb:DeleteItem
            - dynamodb:Scan
            - dynamodb:Query
          Resource:
            - !GetAtt UsersTable.Arn
            - !Sub ${UsersTable.Arn}/index/*
            - !GetAtt ReportsTable.Arn
            - !Sub ${ReportsTable.Arn}/index/*
            - !GetAtt NotificationsTable.Arn
            - !Sub ${NotificationsTable.Arn}/index/*
            - !GetAtt ActivityLogsTable.Arn
            - !Sub ${ActivityLogsTable.Arn}/index/*
            - !GetAtt SupportMessagesTable.Arn
            - !Sub ${SupportMessagesTable.Arn}/index/*

        # Permisos para S3 (Subida de fotos vía URL presignada)
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - s3:PutObject
            - s3:GetObject
            - s3:DeleteObject
          Resource:
            - !Sub arn:aws:s3:::${self:custom.s3BucketName}/*
            - !Sub arn:aws:s3:::${self:custom.profileBucketName}/*

        # Permisos para SNS (Mensajería)
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - sns:Publish
          Resource:
            - !Ref EmergencyAlertsTopic

        # Permisos para Amazon Location Service
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - geo:SearchPlaceIndexForText
            - geo:GetMapTile
          Resource: "*"

        # Permisos para Amazon Cognito
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - cognito-idp:AdminInitiateAuth
            - cognito-idp:AdminCreateUser
            - cognito-idp:AdminDeleteUser
            - cognito-idp:AdminDisableUser
            - cognito-idp:AdminEnableUser
            - cognito-idp:AdminGetUser
            - cognito-idp:AdminListGroupsForUser
            - cognito-idp:AdminUpdateUserAttributes
            - cognito-idp:AdminSetUserPassword
            - cognito-idp:ListUsers
            - cognito-idp:SignUp
            - cognito-idp:ConfirmSignUp
          Resource: "*"

custom:
  s3BucketName: urbanshield-uploads-${self:provider.stage}-${aws:accountId}
  profileBucketName: urbanshield-profile-photos-${self:provider.stage}-${aws:accountId}
  frontendBucketName: urbanshield-frontend-${self:provider.stage}

functions:
  api:
    handler: src/lambda.handler
    timeout: 29
    memorySize: 512
    events:
      - httpApi:
          method: ANY
          path: /
      - httpApi:
          method: ANY
          path: /{proxy+}

resources:
  Resources:
    # ──────────────────────────────────────────
    # 1. Tabla de Usuarios
    # ──────────────────────────────────────────
    UsersTable:
      Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
      Properties:
        TableName: UrbanShield-Users-${self:provider.stage}
        BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST
        AttributeDefinitions:
          - AttributeName: userId
            AttributeType: S
          - AttributeName: email
            AttributeType: S
        KeySchema:
          - AttributeName: userId
            KeyType: HASH
        GlobalSecondaryIndexes:
          - IndexName: GSI_Email
            KeySchema:
              - AttributeName: email
                KeyType: HASH
            Projection:
              ProjectionType: ALL

    # ──────────────────────────────────────────
    # 2. Tabla de Reportes (con GSIs completos)
    # ──────────────────────────────────────────
    ReportsTable:
      Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
      Properties:
        TableName: UrbanShield-Reports-${self:provider.stage}
        BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST
        AttributeDefinitions:
          - AttributeName: reportId
            AttributeType: S
          - AttributeName: status
            AttributeType: S
          - AttributeName: category
            AttributeType: S
          - AttributeName: userId
            AttributeType: S
          - AttributeName: createdAt
            AttributeType: S
        KeySchema:
          - AttributeName: reportId
            KeyType: HASH
        GlobalSecondaryIndexes:
          - IndexName: GSI_StatusCreatedAt
            KeySchema:
              - AttributeName: status
                KeyType: HASH
              - AttributeName: createdAt
                KeyType: RANGE
            Projection:
              ProjectionType: ALL
          - IndexName: GSI_CategoryCreatedAt
            KeySchema:
              - AttributeName: category
                KeyType: HASH
              - AttributeName: createdAt
                KeyType: RANGE
            Projection:
              ProjectionType: ALL
          - IndexName: GSI_UserIdCreatedAt
            KeySchema:
              - AttributeName: userId
                KeyType: HASH
              - AttributeName: createdAt
                KeyType: RANGE
            Projection:
              ProjectionType: ALL

    # ──────────────────────────────────────────
    # 3. Tabla de Notificaciones (con GSI)
    # ──────────────────────────────────────────
    NotificationsTable:
      Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
      Properties:
        TableName: UrbanShield-Notifications-${self:provider.stage}
        BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST
        AttributeDefinitions:
          - AttributeName: notificationId
            AttributeType: S
          - AttributeName: userId
            AttributeType: S
          - AttributeName: createdAt
            AttributeType: S
        KeySchema:
          - AttributeName: notificationId
            KeyType: HASH
        GlobalSecondaryIndexes:
          - IndexName: GSI_UserIdCreatedAt
            KeySchema:
              - AttributeName: userId
                KeyType: HASH
              - AttributeName: createdAt
                KeyType: RANGE
            Projection:
              ProjectionType: ALL

    # ──────────────────────────────────────────
    # 4. Tabla de Auditoría (con GSI)
    # ──────────────────────────────────────────
    ActivityLogsTable:
      Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
      Properties:
        TableName: UrbanShield-ActivityLogs-${self:provider.stage}
        BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST
        AttributeDefinitions:
          - AttributeName: activityId
            AttributeType: S
          - AttributeName: entityType
            AttributeType: S
          - AttributeName: createdAt
            AttributeType: S
        KeySchema:
          - AttributeName: activityId
            KeyType: HASH
        GlobalSecondaryIndexes:
          - IndexName: GSI_EntityTypeCreatedAt
            KeySchema:
              - AttributeName: entityType
                KeyType: HASH
              - AttributeName: createdAt
                KeyType: RANGE
            Projection:
              ProjectionType: ALL

    # ──────────────────────────────────────────
    # 5. Tabla de soporte / inbox (con GSIs)
    # ──────────────────────────────────────────
    SupportMessagesTable:
      Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
      Properties:
        TableName: UrbanShield-SupportMessages-${self:provider.stage}
        BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST
        AttributeDefinitions:
          - AttributeName: supportMessageId
            AttributeType: S
          - AttributeName: userId
            AttributeType: S
          - AttributeName: status
            AttributeType: S
          - AttributeName: createdAt
            AttributeType: S
        KeySchema:
          - AttributeName: supportMessageId
            KeyType: HASH
        GlobalSecondaryIndexes:
          - IndexName: GSI_StatusCreatedAt
            KeySchema:
              - AttributeName: status
                KeyType: HASH
              - AttributeName: createdAt
                KeyType: RANGE
            Projection:
              ProjectionType: ALL
          - IndexName: GSI_UserIdCreatedAt
            KeySchema:
              - AttributeName: userId
                KeyType: HASH
              - AttributeName: createdAt
                KeyType: RANGE
            Projection:
              ProjectionType: ALL

    # NOTE: S3 uploads bucket (urbanshield-uploads-dev-*) and profile photos bucket
    # already exist in AWS from previous deployments. They are NOT managed by this
    # stack to avoid conflicts. Referenced via env vars S3_BUCKET_NAME and S3_PROFILE_BUCKET_NAME.


    # ──────────────────────────────────────────
    # 8. Tema de Amazon SNS para Alertas
    # ──────────────────────────────────────────
    EmergencyAlertsTopic:
      Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
      Properties:
        TopicName: UrbanShield-EmergencyAlerts-${self:provider.stage}

    # ──────────────────────────────────────────
    # 9. Bucket S3 para Frontend estático
    # ──────────────────────────────────────────
    FrontendBucket:
      Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
      Properties:
        BucketName: ${self:custom.frontendBucketName}
        WebsiteConfiguration:
          IndexDocument: index.html
          ErrorDocument: index.html
        PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
          BlockPublicAcls: false
          BlockPublicPolicy: false
          IgnorePublicAcls: false
          RestrictPublicBuckets: false
        OwnershipControls:
          Rules:
            - ObjectOwnership: BucketOwnerPreferred

    FrontendBucketPolicy:
      Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
      Properties:
        Bucket: !Ref FrontendBucket
        PolicyDocument:
          Statement:
            - Effect: Allow
              Principal: '*'
              Action: s3:GetObject
              Resource: !Sub '${FrontendBucket.Arn}/*'

  Outputs:
    FrontendBucketUrl:
      Description: URL of the frontend static website
      Value: !GetAtt FrontendBucket.WebsiteURL
    FrontendBucketName:
      Description: Name of the frontend S3 bucket
      Value: !Ref FrontendBucket
    ApiGatewayUrl:
      Description: URL of the API Gateway
      Value: !Sub 'https://${HttpApi}.execute-api.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com'

serviceProviderAwsCfStackOutputs.Description: Name of the frontend S3 bucket
URL of the frontend static website
